# Q 

2 

M 

LEATHERSET NATURAL

## Interior / maintenance

### Complete leather maintenance set for well maintained leather.

Q²M LeatherSet Natural is a complete solution for maintaining and protecting modern automotive leather. It combines Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural with Q² LeatherCoat REDEFINED to deliver effective cleaning and long-lasting protection in one set, with all the necessary accessories to complete the job in one go.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_leather-cleaner-natural_box_2023-1-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Complete leather maintenance set for well maintained leather.

Q²M LeatherSet Natural simplifies leather care by pairing gentle cleaning with durable protection. It removes light dirt and oily residue, prepares the surface correctly and applies a protective layer that helps preserve the original look and feel of leather upholstery.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons48.svg)

PERFECT FOR DAILY USE 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons21.svg)

SAFE ON ALL TYPES OF LEATHER 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons41.svg)

MILD CLEANING ACTION 

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mleathersetnatural.webp)

BOX CONTAINS 

Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural 200ml / Q² LeatherCoat Redefined 120ml / Q²M ScrubPad EVO / Q²M MF Applicator / Microfibre 

Consumption

1set / 2-3 cars

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

LEATHERSET NATURAL

01
Clean the leather using Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural and the included tools. 

02
Wipe away residue to leave a clean, matte surface. 

03
Apply Q² LeatherCoat REDEFINED evenly to the leather. 

04
Allow the product to bond to the surface. 

05
Let the leather dry before use. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
What is included in Q²M LeatherSet Natural? 

LeatherCleaner Natural, LeatherCoat REDEFINED and application accessories.

02
What type of leather is it intended for? 

Well maintained modern automotive leather.

03
Does it change the look of the leather? 

No. It keeps a factory matte finish.

04
How many cars can one set treat? 

Around two to three vehicles.

05
Is it suitable for coated leather? 

Yes. It is safe for already protected surfaces.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000250657-Q-M-Leather-Set-Mild)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
